name: QxGH
description: QxGH — watch GitHub Actions and Releases from public github.com pages (no REST API). Business-only workbench UI.
author: mcx

preferences.label: Repositories
preferences.description: Public owner/repo — one per line. Reads github.com HTML (no API token).

preferences.label: Poll interval (seconds)
preferences.description: Auto-refresh while the panel is open. 0 disables polling.

preferences.label: Cache minutes
preferences.description: SWR: treat cached Actions/Releases as fresh for this many minutes.

preferences.label: Island for in-progress runs
preferences.description: Show external QxIsland when a watched repo has a running/queued workflow.

commands.name: open-qxgh
commands.title: QxGH
commands.description: Open the QxGH Actions & Releases panel

commands.name: refresh-qxgh
commands.title: Refresh QxGH
commands.description: Force refresh Actions and Releases for pinned repos

commands.name: qxgh-status
commands.title: QxGH CI Summary
commands.description: Toast a short summary of latest runs

commands.name: qxgh-watch-island
commands.title: QxGH Watch on Island
commands.description: Pin the hottest in-progress run on the external island
